query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prosperity_distributions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  distributionType ENUM('member_benefit', 'development_funding', 'stability_support', 'growth_investment', 'legacy_distribution') NOT NULL,
  recipientType ENUM('member_business', 'house', 'individual', 'collective') NOT NULL,
  recipientId INT NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  tokenAmount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  sourceType ENUM('collective_treasury', 'reinvestment_pool', 'grant_fund', 'donation', 'revenue_share') NOT NULL,
  purpose TEXT NOT NULL,
  approvalStatus ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'disbursed', 'rejected', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  approvedBy INT,
  approvalDate TIMESTAMP,
  disbursementDate DATE,
  disbursementMethod ENUM('bank_transfer', 'crypto', 'check', 'internal_transfer', 'token_distribution') DEFAULT NULL,
  transactionReference VARCHAR(255),
  blockchainHash VARCHAR(255),
  conditions TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_type (distributionType),
  INDEX idx_recipient (recipientType, recipientId),
  INDEX idx_status (approvalStatus)
);

  recipientId INT NOT NULL,

  currency VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  tokenAmount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  sourceType ENUM('collective_treasury', 'reinvestment_pool', 'grant_fund', 'donation', 'revenue_share') NOT NULL,
  purpose TEXT NOT NULL,
  approvalStatus ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'disbursed', 'rejected', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  approvedBy INT,
  approvalDate TIMESTAMP,
  disbursementDate DATE,
  disbursementMethod ENUM('bank_transfer', 'crypto', 'check', 'internal_transfer', 'token_distribution') DEFAULT NULL,
  transactionReference VARCHAR(255),
  blockchainHash VARCHAR(255),
  conditions TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_type (distributionType),
  INDEX idx_recipient (recipientType, recipientId),
  INDEX idx_status (approvalStatus)
);
